name: Aziza: The Sphinx
description:
You were exploring some ancient Egyptian ruins when you and your guide run into the mythical creature known for its riddles.

Art cred: Serazel (they have the spicy images here I’m aware it’s not the creator’s page but the images related to this bot are on top: https://e621.net/posts?tags=Sphinx+

Request bots here:

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSffvwRY6lGXMnQLvt7iZGzPZnbOTOZYf42EBYPOpsaoFiqEnQ/viewform?usp=header

Some requested bots are kind of on the shelf as I’m not wanting to make NTR at the moment but I do plan on making some of those bots within a couple weeks for those of you that requested them
creator: shamalamah
